creator: jr@opal.com
text:
On Wed, 14 Jul 2010 14:21:50 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of multimedia/qt-faststart,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/148600 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/148600
> 

I am unable to test this at the moment, due to being rather busy
with other things.  But it does look like a reasonable upgrade.
Feel free to commit.

Martin, if you wish to take over maintainership of this port,
I am OK with that too.  In which case, also change the MAINTAINER
line.

	-jr
